title: Project Miner Import Intake Workbench
objective: Add a read-only Project Miner intake workbench in operations-web that consolidates the current import candidate, admission plan, approval contract, and approval storage plan into one day-to-day PM starting surface without admitting approval persistence, import mutation, schema changes, deployment, or live business-state writes.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / Local Implementation Executor
implementation_summary: Added /pm-review/import-intake as a consolidated read-only PM workbench.
The route reads the four current PM import-intake seams in parallel using the existing PM bearer-token pattern.

The route surfaces candidate identity, source freshness, Project Miner summary counts, warnings, PM decisions, workflow gates, admission row plan, approval contract authority, future approval table, future mutation route, hosted-parity status, and not-allowed-now guardrails.
Linked the workbench from the governed shell, PM drivers route, import-candidate route, import-admission-plan route, and import-approval-readiness route.
Added focused Playwright coverage that stubs all four reads, asserts zero mutation route calls, and verifies no approve, persist, submit, or import buttons are present.
Used a read-only sidecar scout to verify route naming and smoke scope; the scout recommended /pm-review/import-intake and no edits were delegated.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed and route output included /pm-review/import-intake.
Focused PM intake Playwright smokes passed with 4 passed after tightening one location assertion from regex to exact text.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
hosted_status: local_current_only; PM Lane 041A/041B still own hosted Vercel and Render parity closeouts
